content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_webhook_verify
C: skew_window ∧ "300" ∧ reject ∧ "401" ∧ edge_ts_valid
P: widen_skew ∧ clock_sync ∧ tolerate_provider_drift
V: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ no_auth_bypass
A: bump_tolerance ∧ add_skew_test ∧ log_drift

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_webhook_verify.
Constraints: skew_window and "300" and reject and "401" and edge_ts_valid.
Plan: widen_skew and clock_sync and tolerate_provider_drift.
Verify: min_fix and reg_test and no_auth_bypass.
Answer target: bump_tolerance and add_skew_test and log_drift.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_grace_boundary
C: overdue_middleware ∧ rule_overdue_402 ∧ charge_loop
P: grace_window ∧ "24h" ∧ status ∧ "402" ∧ idempotent_charge
V: exact_24h_window ∧ no_loop ∧ 402_after_grace
A: min_fix ∧ boundary_reg_test ∧ assert_24h ∧ assert_402

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_grace_boundary.
Constraints: overdue_middleware and rule_overdue_402 and charge_loop.
Plan: grace_window and "24h" and status and "402" and idempotent_charge.
Verify: exact_24h_window and no_loop and 402_after_grace.
Answer target: min_fix and boundary_reg_test and assert_24h and assert_402.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: recommend_arch
C: team="9" ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ platform_plus_sec
P: steady_traffic ∧ compliance_ready ∧ split_bounded_contexts ∧ pg_per_service
V: modular_monolith ∧ few_extracted_services ∧ shared_pg_schemas ∧ short_why
A: deliver_default_arch ∧ justify_team="9" ∧ fit_ddl="12 weeks" ∧ leverage="PostgreSQL"

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: ship_arch
C: team="6" ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pg_queue ∧ pt_mlops ∧ idempotent_jobs
V: small_team_fit ∧ meets_9_weeks ∧ reuse_PostgreSQL ∧ op_simple
A: adopt_worker_sidecar ∧ use_PostgreSQL_queue ∧ stage_async_enrichment ∧ monitor_slo

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: secure_download
C: baseDir ∧ "download" ∧ req.query.file
P: path_traversal ∧ ".." ∧ unvalidated_input
V: reject ∧ ".." ∧ normalize_path ∧ whitelist_check
A: sanitize_input ∧ path.resolve ∧ verify_prefix ∧ test_traversal

[AUDIT]
Goal: secure_download.
Constraints: baseDir and "download" and req.query.file.
Plan: path_traversal and ".." and unvalidated_input.
Verify: reject and ".." and normalize_path and whitelist_check.
Answer target: sanitize_input and path.resolve and verify_prefix and test_traversal.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT"_concat ∧ req.query."sort" ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection_risk ∧ order_by_tainted ∧ unauth_data_exposure
V: whitelist_"sort"_columns ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown_input
A: patch_diff ∧ add_sqli_test ∧ audit_invoice_admin_api

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor reconcileBatch
C: "async"∧"await"∧"next(err)"
P: load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics
V: async_await∧minimal_change∧order_preserved
A: await_calls∧catch→"next(err)"∧emit_metrics

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: gt(gt(session_check,db.findUser),gt(flags.load,audit.log)) ∧ > ∧ next
V: preserve_order ∧ db_err→"next(err)" ∧ no_behavior_change
A: convert_to_async_await ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_db ∧ call_next

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Plan: gt(gt(session_check, db.findUser), gt(flags.load, audit.log)) and > and next.
Verify: preserve_order and db_err then "next(err)" and no_behavior_change.
Answer target: convert_to_async_await and await_each_step and try_catch_db and call_next.
